set_1.name: iso639-5
set_1.criteria: 008/35-37 or 041$a contains a code from iso639-5.tsv, with 974$r in {pd, pdus}

set_2.name: iso639-3
set_2.criteria: 041 second indicator is 7, 041$2 is iso639-3, and 041$a is present, with 974$r in {pd, pdus}

multiple_match_handling.matched_code: semicolon-separated unique codes in first-seen order
multiple_match_handling.set_type: semicolon-separated unique set labels in first-seen order
multiple_match_handling.field_041: pipe-separated unique rendered 041 fields in first-seen order
